Module com.example.battleship

Package com.example.battleship.model.exception

package com.example.battleship.model.exception
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.example.battleship.model
     
    com.example.battleship.model.board
     
    com.example.battleship.model.player
     
    com.example.battleship.model.ship
     
  • Exceptions
    Class
    Description
    CellAlreadyShotException
    Thrown when a shot targets a cell that has already been shot at (miss, hit, or sunk).
    InvalidShipPlacementException
    Thrown when a ship cannot be placed where requested -- either it would overlap another ship already on the board, or part of it would fall outside the board's bounds.
    OutOfBoardException
    Thrown when a requested row/column falls outside the board (0-9 for a 10x10 board), before a valid Position can even be built.
